page: Microsoft Azure ND96asr_v4 is a high-end, GPU-accelerated virtual machine belonging to the NDASv4_A100 server family. Powered by AMD processors on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 96 dedicated vCPUs and Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization. It is equipped with 900.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 9.38 GB of RAM per core to support memory-intensive operations.

The hardware configuration is heavily optimized for parallel computing, featuring 8.0 integrated GPUs. For high-speed data access and local scratch space, the server includes 10,650 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. Additionally, the instance supports Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) networking, enabling low-latency, high-throughput interconnectivity across multi-node clusters.

Given its massive GPU density, extensive local storage, and RDMA capabilities, the ND96asr_v4 is designed for extreme computational workloads. It is highly suited for deep learning training, large-scale AI inference, high-performance computing (HPC) simulations, and complex data science pipelines. The qualitative cost profile reflects a premium hardware class engineered for resource-dense, multi-node scaling rather than general-purpose computing.
description: Microsoft Azure ND96asr_v4 is a specialized GPU-accelerated virtual machine from the NDASv4_A100 family, designed for high-performance computing and deep learning. Built on the x86_64 architecture with AMD processors, it features 96 dedicated vCPUs, 900.0 GB of system memory, and 8.0 integrated GPUs. The instance is equipped with 10,650 GB of local storage, supports Premium Storage, and features RDMA networking capabilities for low-latency cluster communication. Managed via Microsoft Hyper-V, this server provides a dense hardware profile optimized for multi-node scaling. It is best suited for large-scale artificial intelligence training, complex simulations, and intensive data science workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure ND96asr_v4 is an NDASv4_A100 family virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 900 GB of RAM, 8 GPUs, 10,650 GB of local storage, and RDMA networking for high-performance computing.

tagline: A high-density GPU accelerated platform with dedicated AMD processors, massive local storage, and low-latency RDMA networking for parallel workloads.

900.0 GB of system memory (9.38 GB per core)
10,650 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
RDMA-capable networking for low-latency multi-node clustering
